# B007. Bayesian State Space Regime Detector

## Positioning

This is the most operationally useful Bayesian-style candidate in the set because it routes strategies rather than trying to be the full alpha engine. The current repo already has the HMM and risk-guard plumbing needed to validate the idea in mock/offline mode.

## Reference Basis

- [Bayesian Online Changepoint Detection](../../references/papers/0710.3742_bayesian_online_changepoint_detection.pdf) - change-point framing for regime shifts
- [Multivariate Bayesian Structural Time Series Model](../../references/papers/1801.03222_multivariate_bsts.pdf) - latent-state and trend decomposition reference

## Repo Anchors

### Operational Guardrails

Shared safety and execution rails used by every candidate before a signal can touch capital.
- [src/risk/manager.py](../../../src/risk/manager.py) - pre-trade risk gate and position haircut
- [src/brokers/paper.py](../../../src/brokers/paper.py) - paper-safe broker adapter
- [src/monitoring/health.py](../../../src/monitoring/health.py) - freshness, heartbeat, and kill-switch checks
- [src/backtest/engine.py](../../../src/backtest/engine.py) - deterministic offline backtest runner
- [src/backtest/matching_engine.py](../../../src/backtest/matching_engine.py) - queue-aware synthetic fill model
- [scripts/monitor_health.py](../../../scripts/monitor_health.py) - runtime health loop and stale-data monitor

### Market Data and Features

Point-in-time data loading plus the shared feature builder used by most signal stacks.
- [src/ingestion/loader.py](../../../src/ingestion/loader.py) - point-in-time market data loading
- [src/features/builder.py](../../../src/features/builder.py) - technical, lagged, and derived feature construction

### Regime and State

Regime detection and state overlays used when the signal should shrink or route rather than trade blind.
- [src/models/hmm.py](../../../src/models/hmm.py) - latent regime detector

## Data / Feature Bundle

- Use price, return, and realized-volatility features plus any macro inputs that can be aligned point-in-time.
- Keep the state aligned to the data freshness checks already handled by the health monitor.
- Prefer a small number of latent states so the router stays interpretable.

## Execution Path

- Infer a latent regime and map it to a strategy family or exposure haircut.
- Prefer regime persistence over rapid switching; the router should avoid flapping.
- Let the paper broker and health monitor validate the routing logic in mock-safe mode before any live consideration.

## Risk Controls

- Require a minimum persistence window before a regime change can alter exposure.
- Treat stale data or broken heartbeat as a reason to freeze the router.
- Do not let regime confidence override the risk manager's kill-switch logic.

## Validation Gates

- Check regime stability and transition matrices against the current HMM baseline.
- Run the smoke path and ensure the router does not create unnecessary churn.
- Stratify the backtest by regime and confirm the strategy mix improves drawdown behavior.

## Archive Triggers

- Archive if the regime switches are noisier than a simple rolling-vol heuristic.
- Archive if the router cannot stay stable under the existing replay fixtures.
- Archive if the state machine adds complexity without a measurable risk reduction.

## Next Step

Use this as the regime gate for B001, F023, and F031 before any deeper Bayesian work.
